threat_profile: Opportunistic attacker targeting known vulnerabilities in legacy services.

objectives.title: Service scan on decepticon-msf2
objectives.description: Run a fast targeted scan on high-value ports to fingerprint services. Use nmap -sV -T4 on ports 21,22,23,80,139,445,3306,6667 only.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted nmap -sV scan completed (not a full 65535 scan)

objectives.title: Exploit vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor
objectives.description: Trigger the vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor (CVE-2011-2523): send a username ending with ':)' to port 21, then connect to the backdoor shell on port 6200.
acceptance_criteria: Backdoor triggered — shell obtained on port 6200
objectives.opsec_notes: Known backdoor — reliable, no crash risk.

objectives.title: Credential harvesting
objectives.description: From the vsftpd backdoor shell, harvest /etc/shadow and enumerate users with login shells.
